name: Abdelrahman Alaa Eldeen
title: AI & Software Engineer
heroLead: I design and ship intelligent data systems — LLM assistants over ERP/SQL, Java data-governance platforms, and full-stack products teams can run in production.
heroStack: Next.js · React · Python · Java · LLMs · SQL · AWS · Azure
bio: Software engineer and data scientist with 2 years of experience across enterprise data platforms and AI-assisted products. At Bussma (Jadara Solutions) I delivered BUDG — a closed-source data governance application for metadata, policies, and operational workflows (Java 17, Jakarta Servlets, Elasticsearch, MySQL). After that product shipped, I moved into an AI developer role building an ERP assistant chatbot that answers business questions from the production database using LLMs and a Python backend. Strong in Python, SQL, and Java, with cloud work on AWS and Azure, focused on reliable data access, retrieval, and answers teams can trust.
shortBio: Production-minded AI and backend work: from metadata governance and ERP copilots to ML pipelines that actually ship.
